item.title: PTFE vs Teflon: Are They the Same? Complete Guide 2026
item.description: PTFE and Teflon are the same material — Teflon is DuPont's brand name. But the real question is which fluoropolymer (PTFE, FEP, PFA, ETFE) fits your application. Complete 2026 guide with comparison table.

item.title: Top 10 Free AI Tools for Crypto Traders in 2026
item.description: The best free AI tools for crypto traders: LunarCrush, Freqtrade, CryptoQuant, Glassnode, Coinglass, and more. Tested and ranked by a quant trader.

item.title: World Flag Quiz | Guess 195 Country Flags — Geography Challenge
item.description: Test your world geography! Guess all 195 country flags in timed or relaxed mode. Track your score by continent. Free flag quiz game — no download needed.

item.title: Free QR Code Generator — URL, WiFi, vCard | Pure-Flon
item.description: Generate QR codes instantly for URLs, text, WiFi networks, and vCards. Download as PNG or SVG. Free, client-side, no data sent to servers.

item.title: AI Color Palette Generator — Free Online Tool | Pure-Flon
item.description: Generate beautiful, harmonious color palettes from any seed color. Export as CSS variables, Tailwind config, or image. Free, no login required.

item.title: JSON Formatter & Validator - Free Online Tool | pure-flon
item.description: Free online JSON formatter, validator, and beautifier. Paste your JSON to format, minify, validate with syntax highlighting and error detection. No sign-up required.

item.title: 25 Hardest Country Flags to Identify — Can You Get Them All?
item.description: Can you tell Romania from Chad? Indonesia from Monaco? These are the 25 most commonly confused country flags in the world, with explanations of what makes each pair tricky.

item.title: How to Generate Tailwind CSS Color Palettes — Free Tool
item.description: Create custom Tailwind CSS color palettes with the right shade progression. Free generator with HSL manipulation, 50-950 scale output, and copy-paste config.

item.title: How to Format API JSON Responses — Quick & Free Guide
item.description: Learn how to pretty print messy API JSON responses instantly. Before/after examples, common pitfalls, and a free online JSON formatter. No signup required.

item.title: How to Create a WiFi QR Code — Share Your Password Instantly
item.description: Learn how to create a WiFi QR code that lets guests connect instantly — no typing passwords. Step-by-step guide with free generator. Works on iPhone and Android.

item.title: Pomodoro Timer - Free Online Focus Timer | pure-flon
item.description: Free online Pomodoro timer for focused work sessions. 25-minute work intervals, customizable durations, session tracking, audio notifications, and fullscreen mode. No sign-up required.

item.title: African Country Flag Quiz — Test Your Knowledge
item.description: Can you identify all 54 African country flags? Take the free African flag quiz and test your geography skills. Learn about the Pan-African colors, unique symbols, and stories behind each flag.

item.title: Americas Flag Quiz — North & South America
item.description: Test your knowledge of 35 flags from North America, Central America, South America, and the Caribbean. Free quiz — how many can you name?

item.title: Asian Country Flag Quiz — Can You Name Them All?
item.description: Test your knowledge of 48 Asian country flags. From Japan's simple red circle to Bhutan's thunder dragon — how many can you identify? Free quiz, no signup needed.

item.title: European Flag Quiz — Guess All 44 Countries
item.description: Can you name all 44 European country flags? From Scandinavia's cross flags to the Balkans' intricate coats of arms. Free European flag quiz — no signup required.

item.title: Oceania Flag Quiz — Pacific Island Nations
item.description: Can you identify the flags of Oceania's 14 Pacific island nations plus Australia and New Zealand? Test your knowledge of the world's smallest continent. Free quiz.

item.title: Pure-Flon Color Palette vs Coolors — Free Alternative
item.description: Compare Pure-Flon AI Color Palette Generator with Coolors.co. Both generate color schemes — but one is fully free with no limits, no signup, and full CSS/Tailwind export.

item.title: Pure-Flon JSON Formatter vs JSONLint — Free Comparison
item.description: Comparing Pure-Flon JSON Formatter to JSONLint. Both are free — but one runs entirely client-side with zero ads and no data collection. See the full comparison.

item.title: Pure-Flon QR Generator vs QR Code Monkey — Which is Better?
item.description: Compare Pure-Flon QR Code Generator with QR Code Monkey. Both generate QR codes for free — but one offers full privacy with zero tracking. See the detailed comparison.

item.title: K-Meme Quiz | 한국 인터넷 밈 퀴즈 — 당신의 밈력은?
item.description: 한국 인터넷 밈 퀴즈! 뇌절, 갓생, 현타, 찐친... 50개 이상의 K-밈 중 10문제를 풀며 당신의 밈 지수를 확인하세요. 점수 공유 가능!

item.title: AI 20 Questions | Think of something — AI will guess it
item.description: Challenge the AI mind reader! Think of anything from K-Food, K-Pop, Animals, Tech, Places, or Memes — AI uses information theory to guess it in 20 questions.

item.title: Best Free Developer Tools in 2026 — Our Top Picks | pure-flon blog
item.description: 20 best free developer tools in 2026. From JSON formatters to AI coding assistants — boost your productivity without spending a dime.

item.title: Why Indian Developers Love These 5 Tools | pure-flon blog
item.description: Discover the 5 tools Indian developers swear by in 2026. From Bangalore to Hyderabad, these tools dominate India's booming developer culture.

item.title: Korean Honorifics Explained Simply | pure-flon blog
item.description: A complete guide to Korean honorifics and speech levels. Learn when to use oppa, unnie, nim, yo, and the 7 Korean speech levels with interactive examples.

item.title: How AI Guesses What You're Thinking in Just 4 Questions | pure-flon blog
item.description: Learn how Shannon entropy and information theory let an AI guess what you're thinking in just 4 questions. Interactive examples and a playable game inside.

item.title: Top 10 Korean Foods Foreigners Love (And Where to Start) | pure-flon blog
item.description: Discover the top 10 Korean foods loved by foreigners worldwide. From Korean fried chicken to bibimbap — your ultimate K-food starter guide with spice levels and fun facts.
